subject: [Pre-read] Reg LFF/ CNLS/ Projects Monthly Update - Apr 2026
deck_filename: [For Discussion] Reg CB LFF_CNLS_Projects Monthly Catchup - April_vf.pdf

content.answer:
Hi Ian,

Please find attached slides for our discussion tomorrow, let me know for
any questions.

Thank you.

-- 
*Jason YU*
*Regional CB | MY & SG CB*
*Mobile*: +65 90284825
*Email*: jason.yu@shopee.com

content.question:
Thanks.



Slide 4

   - Where do we stand vs TT in terms of FBS/3PF penetration market by
   market?
- What is the difference between FBS ADO % to seller and to shop?
- Where did we land on when will FBS seller get FBS tag on SKU?

What is
   the # of SKUs/ADO that will lose FBS tag?

How are we getting these sellers
   to bring relevant variations into FBS?

Is it an impactful initiative that
   we should work on?

Slide 7

   - I think we need to look at FBS ADO % of Shop level more closely, as
   compared to just SKUs



Slide 9

   - We calculated using SKU efficiency?

How has SKU efficiency for FBS
   evolved over time?

Slide 11

   - Have we looked at CR% assumptions at current ADIS requirement?

First
   step should be to increase the CR%?
Do we have market by market comparison?

Slide 14 -15

   - Do we have a sense of size of TTS only 3PF sellers by market?

And what
   is the CR % that we expect to bring onboard?

- For the gap between us and TTS right now, how much is it via
   acquisition of 3PF sellers we do not have, how much of it is increasing CR%
   of SLS sellers?

It is not very clear right now



Slide 16

   - Do not quite understand this. For potential sellers on
   Amazon/Temu/Other platforms, are they based in local markets?

Slide 22

   - What is the % of ADO that we anticipate to acquire?

Others

   - What other projects are we working on?

content.answer:
Hi Ian,

Slide 4

   -

   Where do we stand vs TT in terms of FBS/3PF penetration market by market?

Summary in slide 15, we are still behind TTS by 6%. We breakdown of how to
close is in late replies
[image: f3c12abb-f457-4985-9f6e-44fec64ed117.png]



   -

   What is the difference between FBS ADO % to seller and to shop?


Big CB sellers typically have multiple shops, such as multiple SLS shop +
multiple 3PF shop + 1 or multiple FBS shop.


We think tracking FBS% to seller help see seller as a whole and get them to
not only increase FBS shop penetration but also convert their SLS / 3PF
shop to FBS




   -

   Where did we land on when will FBS seller get FBS tag on SKU? What is
   the # of SKUs/ADO that will lose FBS tag? How are we getting these sellers
   to bring relevant variations into FBS? Is it an impactful initiative that
   we should work on?


For FBS tagging, we land on SG MY PH at 80% ADO threshold, TH at 60%
threshold. With this threshold, around ~50% SKU can retain its tag covering
~75% CB FBS ADO. This is expected to launch on 16 Apr. Around 50% of SKU
covering 25% ADO will lose the tag.


Will get FBS tag

SG

MY

TH

PH

#model coverage

45%

54%

55%

53%

ADO coverage

79%

73%

74%

71%


We’re working on a hunt list (for tag losing sellers with >70% ADO) and
will work with CN/KR to do a targeted push to encourage sellers to inbound
more models and prioritize the high performing models as low hanging fruit



Slide 7

   -

   I think we need to look at FBS ADO % of Shop level more closely, as
   compared to just SKUs


Yes, we also monitor ADO% of Shop (in slide 4, below please find the
summary)


In short, the seller penetration and shop penetration is growing in all
markets but we realise that SKU count is declining. Thus we deep dive to
SKU decline today, we will ensure


[image: image.png]



Slide 9

   -

   We calculated using S
increase addressable SKU,
Launch New SKU package,
Check WH capacity,

CN/KR to assess if to add to RM KPI


[image: image.png]



Slide 11

   -

   Have we looked at CR% assumptions at current ADIS requirement? First
   step should be to increase the CR%? Do we have market by market comparison?


Yes we look at CR% at the current addressable pool (factor in ADIS cut off
and licensing requirement). Current CR% is around 19% (PH/TH ADIS
requirement is more strict, hence pool is smaller and CR% higher at 27% and
19%)


Yes our proposal is to focus on current pool first and trigger ADIS
discussion when we hit >50% conversion of current pool



 [image: image.png]

Slide 14 -15

   -

   Do we have a sense of size of TTS only 3PF sellers by market? And what
   is the CR % that we expect to bring onboard?


We have a view of TTS only 3PF sellers based on 3PF survey, but we will
also gather this information from each local BI team, just like how we did
for VN.

Based on 3PF vendor survey, TTS only 3PF sellers total around 239k ADO
(slide 22), we are targeting to acquire ~20% of all sellers that 3PFs
indicated in the survey


ADO view

MY

TH

PH

VN

TTS only 3PF seller ADO base

(Slide 22)

10.9k

17%

MY

TH

PH

TTS only 3PF sellers (Slide 22)

1.9k

1.1k

Program target to acquire TTS 3PF sellers

454

243

177

47

Conversion

24%

22%

16%

7%



   -

   For the gap between us and TTS right now, how much is it via acquisition
   of 3PF sellers we do not have, how much of it is increasing CR% of SLS
   sellers? It is not very clear right now


We will get back on this on more clear view with by market breakdown and by
lever breakdown so that we can track this more closely, our initial view is
as below

   -

   Apr MTD we are at 50% LFF
   -

   TT

Hi All,

Please see follow up from our catchup today, thank you.

No. Topic Action Items PIC DDL
1 SKU push together with FBS Tagging Identify SKU hunt list to push for
sellers inbound more SKU to hit 80% threshold and size the impact Jason 21
Apr
2 SKU pool assessment For SKU funnel, extract top unconverted ADIS SKUs and
filter for eligible to inbound SKUs for priority pushing
For SKU that are light and more expensive to do FBS than SLS, to assess
impact to FBS SKU pool and discuss with local for solution e.g., rate card
flexibility Jason 30 Apr
3 TTS 3PF Program Target setting Re-assess TTS 3PF program target and push
for higher coverage over TTS only 3PF sellers pool Jason 21 Apr
